items.title: Home Depot's Dual Focus: DIY Revival Meets Pro Acceleration
items.description: HD's sales rise 4.9% y/y in Q2 as it revives DIY demand and accelerates Pro growth through strategic acquisitions and innovation.

items.title: Cramer Backs Home Depot for Housing Recovery Despite ICE Raid Controversy
items.description: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of Jim Cramer’s Recession-Proof Stock Picks. Jim Cramer sees a possible growth in the stock value as well as the housing market, following the Fed rate cuts. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) raids on The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD)’s parking lots for illegal immigrants have sparked quite a […]

items.title: Plug Power Successfully Raises $370 Million From Warrant Inducement Transaction With the Potential to Receive an Additional $1.4 Billion in Gross Proceeds if New Warrants are Fully Exercised
items.description: Warrant Exercise by Existing Institutional Investor Improves Plug Power's Financial Position and Accelerates Its Growth InitiativesSLINGERLANDS, N.Y., Oct. 08, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Plug Power Inc.
